risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) component of the project was canceled, and IDA grant disbursements remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating persistent fragility in the operating environment that constrains project execution and institutional capacity.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_title: Severe Underperformance in Displaced Persons Integration
risk_summary: Zero progress on passport processing for Afghan refugees in Pakistan and zero IDP/returnee households reached with employment support, indicating inability to implement core FCV-related objectives targeting displaced populations.
evidence_quote: Percentage of Afghan Passport Applications in Pakistan Processed: Baseline 0.00, Actual (Current) 0.00, End Target 80.00... The Afghan missions in Pakistan has not been able to process machine readable passports yet, since required equipment has not been procured.

risk_title: Inability to Serve IDP and Returnee Populations
risk_summary: Of which IDP/Returnee households indicator shows zero achievement against a target of 10,000, indicating the project is failing to reach its core FCV-affected beneficiary population despite the project's explicit focus on displaced persons.
